title: linaria dumanii
intro: Linaria dumanii, also known as the Duman's toadflax, is a species of flowering plant in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including coughs and respiratory issues. The plant is believed to possess expectorant and antitussive properties, helping to relieve congestion and soothe the throat. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of Linaria dumanii can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate respiratory problems and promote overall well-being.
